3013960.name: Manaballs
3013960.description:
Manaballs is an online survival game with roguelike, extraction and farming elements, designed to immerse you in a dynamic and interactive world. Venture into the woods, gather resources, build bases, and engage with other players through voice chat. Team up with friends to extract from dungeons, craft powerful weapons, and raid enemy bases for that sweet loot.

Survival isn't just about chopping trees and mining ore—it's about collaboration, strategy, and outwitting your foes. Each run is unique, with procedural dungeons offering rare items that can tip the balance in your favor. Watch your back, and plan your escape—other players can enter! Farm slimes and plants in your base to produce essential goodies and mana balls, which are crucial for crafting devastating mana bombs. These bombs can obliterate enemy structures, allowing you to seize their treasures.

Features:

Proximity Voice Chat:

Meet and strategize with other players, or engage in some friendly trash talk.

Dynamic Base Building:

Use gathered resources to construct and fortify your base. Be ready to defend it or launch raids on others.

Challenging Procedural Dungeons:

Explore and conquer dungeons to extract with unique items with special effects and perks.

Resource Management and Crafting:

Gather materials, craft weapons, and create powerful mana bombs to use in your raids.

Farm and Harvest:

Tend to slimes and plants in your base, producing valuable items and mana balls.

Fight:

stab stab stab slash slash slash.
3013960.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
